0.text: Linear densities in the apicoposterior part of the upper lobe of the right lung

1.text: Subcentimeter calcified nodules in the apicoposterior part of the upper lobe of the right lung

2.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs, predominantly in the lower lobes

3.text: Subtle ground-glass opacity in the subpleural area of the superior segment of the left lower lobe
